HERO.TITLE: Cenote Adventuring in Puerto Morelos: Private Tour Through the Best Hidden Cenotes
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Discover the magic of cenotes Puerto Morelos on an exclusive journey designed for travelers who want more than just a typical excursion.

AWARDS.TITLE: Awards & Recognitions
AWARDS.DESCRIPTION: We take pride in our dedication to offering meaningful and sustainable adventures, connecting travelers with the authentic essence of the Puerto Morelos cenotes.

TRIPADVISOR.TITLE: Travelers’ Choice Best of the Best
TRIPADVISOR.DESCRIPTION: Proudly ranked among the top 1% of attractions worldwide, recognized for our exceptional private cenote experiences and commitment to excellence.

WORLD_TRAVEL_AWARDS.TITLE: World Travel Awards
WORLD_TRAVEL_AWARDS.DESCRIPTION: Recognized as Mexico's Leading Adventure Tour Operator, celebrating our multi-year excellence and leadership in the global travel industry.

NATIONAL_GEOGRAPHIC.TITLE: National Geographic Traveller
NATIONAL_GEOGRAPHIC.DESCRIPTION: Mentioned as one of the top experiences in the Riviera Maya.

GALLERY.TITLE: Step Into the Magic of the Maya Jungle and Hidden Cenotes
GALLERY.DESCRIPTION: Explore our gallery to witness the breathtaking beauty of Puerto Morelos' most exclusive cenotes. From crystal-clear waters and ancient rock formations to vibrant jungle landscapes, see the unforgettable moments that await you on our private adventures.

CHOOSE_PLAN.TITLE: Choose the Perfect Plan for Your Cenote Adventure
CHOOSE_PLAN.DESCRIPTION: We offer flexible, tailored options to match your travel style. Whether you are seeking an exclusive private journey or a premium small-group experience, enjoy the most authentic cenote tour in Puerto Morelos.

PRIVATE.TITLE: Private Cenote Experience
PRIVATE.DESCRIPTION: Experience an exclusive snorkeling adventure with a private boat, personalized service, and more amenities.
FEATURES: Unlimited drinks included on the boat
Vip meal: 4 tacos and 2 drinks (during lunch)

CENOTE.TITLE: Cenote adventuring
CENOTE.DESCRIPTION: Explore Cenote Adventuring Cancun: Swim, zipline, and discover Mexico’s natural wonders on our exclusive tour.

FAQS.TITLE: Prepare for Your Jungle Journey: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQS.DESCRIPTION: Everything you need to know before diving into the Maya jungle. We’ve gathered the most common questions to ensure your cenote adventure is seamless and unforgettable.

CARD_CONTACT.TITLE: Need More Information?
CARD_CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Whether it's a special request or a custom private itinerary, our team of experts is ready to help you plan the perfect experience.

FAQS.question: How many cenotes are included in the tour?
FAQS.answer: The experience typically includes visits to multiple cenotes along the Ruta de los Cenotes, depending on your selected package and preferences.

FAQS.question: Is this tour suitable for beginners?
FAQS.answer: Yes! No prior experience is needed. The tour is designed for all levels, making it one of the best things to do in Puerto Morelos for beginners.

FAQS.question: How far is Puerto Morelos from Cancun?
FAQS.answer: Puerto Morelos is located about 20–30 minutes from Cancun, making it an easy and convenient destination for a cenote tour Cancun.

FAQS.question: What should I bring for the cenote tour?
FAQS.answer: Bring swimwear, biodegradable sunscreen, a towel, and comfortable clothing. Everything else will be provided for your cenote Puerto Morelos experience.

HERO.TITLE: Get in touch with us
HERO.DESCRIPTION: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have questions about our snorkeling tour, need assistance with booking, or want to share your feedback, our team is here to help.

INFO.TITLE: Contact Us
INFO.DESCRIPTION: Feel free to reach out to us through any of the following methods. We look forward to assisting you and ensuring you have an unforgettable snorkeling adventure in Puerto Morelos!

SUCCESS_FORM.TITLE: Thank you for contacting us
SUCCESS_FORM.DESCRIPTION: Your message has been sent and we will get back to you shortly. If you have any questions or need immediate assistance, please call us at +52 998 249 0003 or email us at info@snorkeladventuring.com.

ERROR_FORM.TITLE: Oops! Something went wrong
ERROR_FORM.DESCRIPTION: We are sorry, but it seems there was a problem making your email. Please try again later or contact us directly at +52 998 249 0003. Thank you for your understanding!

LIST.TITLE: Guided Experience
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Along the Ruta de los Cenotes, your guide will take you to carefully selected cenotes known for their beauty and tranquility. You’ll have time to swim in crystal-clear waters, snorkel through rock formations, and relax in nature.

LIST.TITLE: Vibrant Equipment Provided
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Snorkel, mask, and fins are usually included.

LIST.TITLE: Vibrant Safety Briefing
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Learn about the reef and safety protocols.

LIST.TITLE: Vibrant Marine Life Encounters
LIST.DESCRIPTION: See colorful fish, corals, and maybe even sea turtles.

INTRO.TITLE: About Us – Our Story
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_1: For over 18 years, Extreme Adventuring Cancun has been the leading ecological adventure park on the iconic Ruta de los Cenotes in Puerto Morelos. What began as a small project created to support the local community after port closures has grown into one of Mexico’s most celebrated adventure experiences.
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_2: Today, we welcome travelers from all over the world to discover the jungle, cenotes, culture, and spirit of the Mayan world through immersive, safe, and unforgettable activities.
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_3: We are a Mexican company with more than 18 years of experience, proudly recognized multiple times at an international level by the World Travel Awards, TripAdvisor, and National Geographic Traveller

OUR_STORY.TITLE: Our Story
OUR_STORY.DESCRIPTION_1: Extreme Adventuring Cancun was founded with a single purpose: to give visitors a safe, natural, and unforgettable adventure inspired by the Mayan jungle.
OUR_STORY.DESCRIPTION_2: For nearly two decades, we have designed experiences that blend ecotourism, entertainment, culture, and family-friendly adventure, always prioritizing safety, environmental respect, and the preservation of the Selva Maya.
OUR_STORY.TITLE_LIST: What started with a single tour has grown into a full ecopark that includes:
OUR_STORY.SUBTITLE_LIST: Our legacy is built on trust, innovation, and warm hospitality, serving tens of thousands of travelers every year.
LIST: A tequila tasting produced with regional heritage

HUMAN_PHILOSOPHY.TITLE: “Me Hosting Me” – Our Human Philosophy
HUMAN_PHILOSOPHY.DESCRIPTION: Our guiding principle is simple but powerful: “Me hosting me” — We treat you the way we’d like to be treated.
HUMAN_PHILOSOPHY.TITLE_LIST: This philosophy shapes every interaction, ensuring:
HUMAN_PHILOSOPHY.SUBTITLE_LIST: At Extreme Adventuring Cancun, every visitor is welcomed like family.
LIST: A genuine connection between visitors and staff

OUR_VALUE_PROPOSITION.TITLE: Our Value Proposition
OUR_VALUE_PROPOSITION.DESCRIPTION: Extreme Adventuring Cancun is the ideal destination for travelers who want: Safe Adventures + Real Mayan Culture + Natural Immersion, We offer a unique combination of:

VALUES.TITLE: Adventure
VALUES.DESCRIPTION: ATVs, ziplines, cenotes, horseback riding, snorkeling, and more — all operated with strict safety standards, trained guides, and high-quality equipment. Our fleet includes 30 transportation units equipped with GPS, speed control systems, and onboard cameras, ensuring punctuality and protection from beginning to end.

VALUES.TITLE: Culture
VALUES.DESCRIPTION: Our experiences integrate authentic Mayan heritage through: Narratives inspired by the Selva Maya, Traditional culinary tasting, Local art, history, and symbolic elements, Tequila tasting rooted in Mexican tradition.

VALUES.TITLE: Nature
VALUES.DESCRIPTION: We operate in one of the most stunning ecosystems of the Yucatán Peninsula — the jungle and the cenotes — and promote its preservation, environmental education, and sustainable development.

VALUES.TITLE: Gastronomy
VALUES.DESCRIPTION: Our tours include regional flavors, snacks, and traditional elements highlighting the richness of Mexican cuisine. This fusion of adventure, culture, and nature is what makes us one of the top-rated adventure parks in Mexico and the world.

EXTREME_PARTNERS.TITLE: Extreme Partners – Our Affiliate Program
EXTREME_PARTNERS.DESCRIPTION: Extreme Partners is our official Affiliate Program, designed for travel agencies, hotels, influencers, and tourism companies seeking to offer top-tier adventure experiences.

BENEFITS.TITLE: Benefits of Joining Extreme Partners
BENEFITS.DESCRIPTION: We currently collaborate with partners across Mexico, the United States, Canada, Europe, and South America, positioning Extreme Adventuring Cancun as one of the most widely sold adventure products in the region.
BENEFITS.DESCRIPTION_2: To become an affiliate, agencies can contact our commercial department or request onboarding materials.
LIST: 18+ years of reputation and international awards

RECOGNITIONS.TITLE: Awards, Recognitions & Global Mentions
RECOGNITIONS.DESCRIPTION: Extreme Adventuring Cancun is one of the most awarded adventure parks in Latin America, consistently recognized by global institutions for excellence, sustainability, and visitor experience.
RECOGNITIONS.DESCRIPTION_2: These recognitions demonstrate our commitment to innovation, quality, sustainability, and world-class tourism.

WTA.TITLE: World Travel Awards
LIST: Mexico & Central America’s Leading Adventure Tourist Attraction 2025

LIST: Awarded for excellence as an ecological adventure park
Highlighted for quality, sustainability, and outstanding guest experience

NATGEO.TITLE: National Geographic Traveller
LIST: Featured as a recommended Mexican adventure experience in their international edition (2025)

SUSTAINABILITY.TITLE: Sustainability & Our Commitment to the Jungle
SUSTAINABILITY.DESCRIPTION: Extreme Adventuring Cancun operates under a sustainability model focused on:
SUSTAINABILITY.DESCRIPTION_2: We believe that preserving the Selva Maya is a shared responsibility and an essential part of our mission.

OUR_PROMISE.TITLE: Our Promise
OUR_PROMISE.DESCRIPTION: We work every day with a clear purpose: “To make every day with us the best day of your vacation”, Adventure, culture, nature, and exceptional service — all in one place.
